# duplocloud_aws_firehose (Resource)

`duplocloud_aws_firehose` manages an AWS Data Firehose delivery stream in Duplo.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "duplocloud_tenant" "myapp" {
  account_name = "myapp"
  plan_id      = "default"
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Example 1: ExtendedS3DestinationConfiguration 
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------

resource "duplocloud_aws_firehose" "extended_s3" {
  tenant_id            = duplocloud_tenant.myapp.tenant_id
  name                 = "test-firehose-extended-s3"
  delivery_stream_type = "DirectPut"

  extended_s3_destination_configuration {
    bucket_arn          = "arn:aws:s3:::duploservices-sep8-forairflow-100000000004"
    role_arn            = "arn:aws:iam::100000000004:role/firehoseRole"
    prefix              = "firehose/extended/"
    error_output_prefix = "firehose/errors/"
    compression_format  = "GZIP"
    s3_backup_mode      = "Disabled"

    buffering_hints {
      size_in_mbs         = 5
      interval_in_seconds = 300
    }

    processing_configuration {
      enabled = true
      processors {
        type = "Lambda"
        parameters {
          parameter_name  = "LambdaArn"
          parameter_value = "arn:aws:lambda:us-west-2:100000000004:function:duploservices-sep8-testlmb:$LATEST"
        }
        parameters {
          parameter_name  = "BufferSizeInMBs"
          parameter_value = "3"
        }
        parameters {
          parameter_name  = "BufferIntervalInSeconds"
          parameter_value = "60"
        }
      }
    }

    cloudwatch_logging_options {
      enabled         = true
      log_group_name  = "/aws/firehose/extended-s3"
      log_stream_name = "S3Delivery"
    }
  }

  # tags = {
  #   env  = "dev"
  #   type = "extended-s3"
  # }
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Example 2: KinesisStreamAsSource → ExtendedS3 (active)
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------
resource "duplocloud_aws_firehose" "kinesis_to_s3" {
  tenant_id            = duplocloud_tenant.myapp.tenant_id
  name                 = "test-firehose-kinesis-s3"
  delivery_stream_type = "KinesisStreamAsSource"

  kinesis_source_configuration {
    kinesis_stream_arn = "arn:aws:kinesis:us-west-2:100000000004:stream/tf-test"
    role_arn           = "arn:aws:iam::100000000004:role/firehoseRole"
  }

  extended_s3_destination_configuration {
    bucket_arn         = "arn:aws:s3:::duploservices-sep8-forairflow-100000000004"
    role_arn           = "arn:aws:iam::100000000004:role/firehoseRole"
    prefix             = "firehose/kinesis/"
    compression_format = "GZIP"

    buffering_hints {
      size_in_mbs         = 64
      interval_in_seconds = 350
    }
  }

  #  tags = {
  #    env    = "dev"
  #    source = "kinesis"
  #  }
}


# -----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Example 3: RedshiftDestinationConfiguration
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------
resource "duplocloud_aws_firehose" "redshift" {
  tenant_id            = duplocloud_tenant.myapp.tenant_id
  name                 = "test-firehose-redshift"
  delivery_stream_type = "DirectPut"

  redshift_destination_configuration {
    cluster_jdbcurl = "jdbc:redshift://mycluster.us-west-2.redshift.amazonaws.com:5439/mydb"
    role_arn        = "arn:aws:iam::100000000004:role/firehoseRole"
    username        = "firehose_user"
    password        = "Replace_me"
    retry_duration  = 3000

    copy_command {
      data_table_name    = "firehose_ingest"
      data_table_columns = "col1,col2,col3"
      copy_options       = "delimiter '|'"
    }

    s3_configuration {
      bucket_arn         = "arn:aws:s3:::duploservices-sep8-forairflow-100000000004"
      role_arn           = "arn:aws:iam::100000000004:role/firehoseRole"
      compression_format = "UNCOMPRESSED"

      buffering_hints {
        size_in_mbs         = 5
        interval_in_seconds = 300
      }
    }

    s3_backup_mode = "Enabled"

    s3_backup_configuration {
      bucket_arn         = "arn:aws:s3:::duploservices-sep8-forairflow-100000000004"
      role_arn           = "arn:aws:iam::100000000004:role/firehoseRole"
      compression_format = "GZIP"

      buffering_hints {
        size_in_mbs         = 5
        interval_in_seconds = 350
      }
    }

    processing_configuration {
      enabled = true

      processors {
        type = "Lambda"

        parameters {
          parameter_name  = "LambdaArn"
          parameter_value = "arn:aws:lambda:us-west-2:100000000004:function:myLambda:$LATEST"
        }
      }
    }

    cloudwatch_logging_options {
      enabled         = true
      log_group_name  = "/aws/kinesisfirehose/redshift"
      log_stream_name = "DestinationDelivery"
    }
  }

  # tags = {
  #   env  = "dev"
  #   type = "redshift"
  # }
}


# -----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Example: OpenSearch Destination Configuration
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------
resource "duplocloud_aws_firehose" "opensearch" {
  tenant_id            = duplocloud_tenant.myapp.tenant_id
  name                 = "test-firehose-opensearch"
  delivery_stream_type = "DirectPut"

  opensearch_destination_configuration {
    index_name            = "firehose-logs"
    role_arn              = "arn:aws:iam::100000000004:role/firehoseRole"
    domain_arn            = "arn:aws:es:us-west-2:100000000004:domain/duploservices-sep8-tfcode"
    index_rotation_period = "OneDay"
    retry_duration        = 306
    s3_backup_mode        = "FailedDocumentsOnly"

    buffering_hints {
      size_in_mbs         = 5
      interval_in_seconds = 350
    }

    s3_configuration {
      bucket_arn         = "arn:aws:s3:::duploservices-sep8-forairflow-100000000004"
      role_arn           = "arn:aws:iam::100000000004:role/firehoseRole"
      compression_format = "UNCOMPRESSED"

      buffering_hints {
        size_in_mbs         = 5
        interval_in_seconds = 300
      }
    }
    vpc_configuration {
      role_arn = "arn:aws:iam::100000000004:role/firehoseRole"
      security_group_ids = [
        "sg-060ea8b713daf0bf2",
      ]
      subnet_ids = [
        "subnet-065ab3e894092dd1c",
        "subnet-09252308e1a093bda",
      ]
    }
    cloudwatch_logging_options {
      enabled         = true
      log_group_name  = "/aws/firehose/opensearch"
      log_stream_name = "DestinationDelivery"
    }
  }
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Example: OpenSearch Serverless Destination Configuration
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------
resource "duplocloud_aws_firehose" "opensearch_serverless" {
  tenant_id            = duplocloud_tenant.myapp.tenant_id
  name                 = "test-firehose-oss"
  delivery_stream_type = "DirectPut"

  opensearch_serverless_destination_configuration {
    collection_endpoint = "https://tuvxe7y4ampqqf0xjtse.us-west-2.aoss.amazonaws.com"
    index_name          = "firehose-logs"
    role_arn            = "arn:aws:iam::100000000004:role/firehoseRole"
    retry_duration      = 300
    s3_backup_mode      = "FailedDocumentsOnly"

    buffering_hints {
      size_in_mbs         = 5
      interval_in_seconds = 300
    }

    s3_configuration {
      bucket_arn = "arn:aws:s3:::duploservices-sep8-forairflow-100000000004"
      role_arn   = "arn:aws:iam::100000000004:role/firehoseRole"

      buffering_hints {
        size_in_mbs         = 5
        interval_in_seconds = 350
      }
    }

    vpc_configuration {
      role_arn = "arn:aws:iam::100000000004:role/firehoseRole"
      security_group_ids = [
        "sg-060ea8b713daf0bf2",
      ]
      subnet_ids = [
        "subnet-065ab3e894092dd1c",
        "subnet-09252308e1a093bda",
      ]
    }

    cloudwatch_logging_options {
      enabled         = true
      log_group_name  = "/aws/firehose/opensearch-serverless"
      log_stream_name = "DestinationDelivery"
    }
  }
}


# -----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Example: Elasticsearch Destination Configuration
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------
resource "duplocloud_aws_firehose" "elasticsearch" {
  tenant_id            = duplocloud_tenant.myapp.tenant_id
  name                 = "test-firehose-es"
  delivery_stream_type = "DirectPut"

  elasticsearch_destination_configuration {
    index_name            = "firehose-logs"
    role_arn              = "arn:aws:iam::100000000004:role/firehoseRole"
    domain_arn            = "arn:aws:es:us-west-2:100000000004:domain/duploservice-sep8-es"
    index_rotation_period = "OneDay"
    retry_duration        = 300
    s3_backup_mode        = "FailedDocumentsOnly"

    buffering_hints {
      size_in_mbs         = 5
      interval_in_seconds = 300
    }

    s3_configuration {
      bucket_arn = "arn:aws:s3:::duploservices-sep8-forairflow-100000000004"
      role_arn   = "arn:aws:iam::100000000004:role/firehoseRole"

      buffering_hints {
        size_in_mbs         = 5
        interval_in_seconds = 300
      }
    }

    cloudwatch_logging_options {
      enabled         = true
      log_group_name  = "/aws/firehose/elasticsearch"
      log_stream_name = "DestinationDelivery"
    }
    vpc_configuration {
      role_arn = "arn:aws:iam::100000000004:role/firehoseRole"
      security_group_ids = [
        "sg-060ea8b713daf0bf2",
      ]
      subnet_ids = [
        "subnet-065ab3e894092dd1c",
        "subnet-09252308e1a093bda",
      ]
    }

  }
}


# -----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Example: MSK Source Configuration (with ExtendedS3 destination)
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------
resource "duplocloud_aws_firehose" "msk_source" {
  tenant_id            = duplocloud_tenant.myapp.tenant_id
  name                 = "test-firehose-msk"
  delivery_stream_type = "MSKAsSource"

  msk_source_configuration {
    msk_cluster_arn     = "arn:aws:kafka:us-west-2:100000000004:cluster/duploservices-sep8-msk/bedc1eeb-cd0f-4379-bbb4-8fb3cfd816d5-s3"
    topic_name          = "my-kafka-topic"
    read_from_timestamp = "2026-03-31T00:00:00Z"

    authentication_configuration {
      connectivity = "PRIVATE"
      role_arn     = "arn:aws:iam::100000000004:role/firehoseRole"
    }
  }

  extended_s3_destination_configuration {
    bucket_arn = "arn:aws:s3:::duploservices-sep8-forairflow-100000000004"
    role_arn   = "arn:aws:iam::100000000004:role/firehoseRole"

    buffering_hints {
      size_in_mbs         = 5
      interval_in_seconds = 350
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The short name of the Firehose delivery stream. Duplo prepends a tenant prefix automatically.
- `tenant_id` (String) The GUID of the tenant that the Firehose delivery stream will be created in.

### Optional

- `delivery_stream_type` (String) Source type. `DirectPut` (default), `KinesisStreamAsSource`, or `MSKAsSource`. Defaults to `DirectPut`.
- `elasticsearch_destination_configuration` (Block List, Max: 1) Elasticsearch destination configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--elasticsearch_destination_configuration))
- `extended_s3_destination_configuration` (Block List, Max: 1) Extended S3 destination configuration (recommended over `s3_destination_configuration`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--extended_s3_destination_configuration))
- `kinesis_source_configuration` (Block List, Max: 1) Kinesis stream source. Required when `delivery_stream_type` is `KinesisStreamAsSource`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--kinesis_source_configuration))
- `msk_source_configuration` (Block List, Max: 1) MSK (Managed Streaming for Kafka) source. Required when `delivery_stream_type` is `MSKAsSource`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--msk_source_configuration))
- `opensearch_destination_configuration` (Block List, Max: 1) OpenSearch Service destination configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--opensearch_destination_configuration))
- `opensearch_serverless_destination_configuration` (Block List, Max: 1) Amazon OpenSearch Serverless destination configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--opensearch_serverless_destination_configuration))
- `redshift_destination_configuration` (Block List, Max: 1) Redshift destination configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--redshift_destination_configuration))
- `tags` (Map of String) Key-value map of resource tags.
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `arn` (String) The ARN of the Firehose delivery stream.
- `full_name` (String) The full name of the delivery stream including the Duplo tenant prefix.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String) The current status of the delivery stream.

<a id="nestedblock--elasticsearch_destination_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `elasticsearch_destination_configuration`

Required:

- `index_name` (String) The Elasticsearch index name.
- `role_arn` (String) ARN of the IAM role.
- `s3_configuration` (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Intermediate S3 configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--elasticsearch_destination_configuration--s3_configuration))

Optional:

- `buffering_hints` (Block List, Max: 1) Buffering options. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--elasticsearch_destination_configuration--buffering_hints))
- `cloudwatch_logging_options` (Block List, Max: 1) CloudWatch logging configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--elasticsearch_destination_configuration--cloudwatch_logging_options))
- `cluster_endpoint` (String) Endpoint of the Elasticsearch cluster. Conflicts with `domain_arn`.
- `domain_arn` (String) ARN of the Elasticsearch domain. Conflicts with `cluster_endpoint`.
- `index_rotation_period` (String) Index rotation period. Valid values: `NoRotation`, `OneHour`, `OneDay`, `OneWeek`, `OneMonth`. Default: `OneDay`. Defaults to `OneDay`.
- `processing_configuration` (Block List, Max: 1) Configuration for data processing. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--elasticsearch_destination_configuration--processing_configuration))
- `retry_duration` (Number) Retry duration in seconds (0–7200). Default: 300. Defaults to `300`.
- `s3_backup_mode` (String) S3 backup mode. `FailedDocumentsOnly` (default) or `AllDocuments`. Defaults to `FailedDocumentsOnly`.
- `type_name` (String) Elasticsearch type name. Max 100 chars.
- `vpc_configuration` (Block List, Max: 1) VPC configuration. ForceNew. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--elasticsearch_destination_configuration--vpc_configuration))

<a id="nestedblock--elasticsearch_destination_configuration--s3_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `elasticsearch_destination_configuration.s3_configuration`

Required:

- `bucket_arn` (String) ARN of the S3 bucket.
- `role_arn` (String) ARN of the IAM role.

Optional:

- `buffering_hints` (Block List, Max: 1) Buffering options. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--elasticsearch_destination_configuration--s3_configuration--buffering_hints))
- `cloudwatch_logging_options` (Block List, Max: 1) CloudWatch logging configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--elasticsearch_destination_configuration--s3_configuration--cloudwatch_logging_options))
- `compression_format` (String) Compression format. Default: `UNCOMPRESSED`. Defaults to `UNCOMPRESSED`.
- `prefix` (String) S3 key prefix.

<a id="nestedblock--elasticsearch_destination_configuration--s3_configuration--buffering_hints"></a>
### Nested Schema for `elasticsearch_destination_configuration.s3_configuration.buffering_hints`

Optional:

- `interval_in_seconds` (Number) Buffer interval in seconds (60–900). Default 300. Defaults to `300`.
- `size_in_mbs` (Number) Buffer size in MB before delivery (1–128). Default 5. Defaults to `5`.


<a id="nestedblock--elasticsearch_destination_configuration--s3_configuration--cloudwatch_logging_options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `elasticsearch_destination_configuration.s3_configuration.cloudwatch_logging_options`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Defaults to `false`.
- `log_group_name` (String)
- `log_stream_name` (String)



<a id="nestedblock--elasticsearch_destination_configuration--buffering_hints"></a>
### Nested Schema for `elasticsearch_destination_configuration.buffering_hints`

Optional:

- `interval_in_seconds` (Number) Buffer interval in seconds (60–900). Default 300. Defaults to `300`.
- `size_in_mbs` (Number) Buffer size in MB before delivery (1–128). Default 5. Defaults to `5`.


<a id="nestedblock--elasticsearch_destination_configuration--cloudwatch_logging_options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `elasticsearch_destination_configuration.cloudwatch_logging_options`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Defaults to `false`.
- `log_group_name` (String)
- `log_stream_name` (String)


<a id="nestedblock--elasticsearch_destination_configuration--processing_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `elasticsearch_destination_configuration.processing_configuration`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether data processing is enabled. Defaults to `true`.
- `processors` (Block List) List of processors. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--elasticsearch_destination_configuration--processing_configuration--processors))

<a id="nestedblock--elasticsearch_destination_configuration--processing_configuration--processors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `elasticsearch_destination_configuration.processing_configuration.processors`

Required:

- `type` (String) Processor type. Valid values: `RecordDeAggregation`, `Decompression`, `CloudWatchLogProcessing`, `Lambda`, `MetadataExtraction`, `AppendDelimiterToRecord`.

Optional:

- `parameters` (Block Set) List of processor parameters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--elasticsearch_destination_configuration--processing_configuration--processors--parameters))

<a id="nestedblock--elasticsearch_destination_configuration--processing_configuration--processors--parameters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `elasticsearch_destination_configuration.processing_configuration.processors.parameters`

Required:

- `parameter_name` (String) Parameter name (e.g. `LambdaArn`, `NumberOfRetries`, `RoleArn`, `BufferSizeInMBs`, `BufferIntervalInSeconds`).
- `parameter_value` (String) Parameter value.




<a id="nestedblock--elasticsearch_destination_configuration--vpc_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `elasticsearch_destination_configuration.vpc_configuration`

Required:

- `role_arn` (String)
- `security_group_ids` (Set of String)
- `subnet_ids` (Set of String)

Read-Only:

- `vpc_id` (String)



<a id="nestedblock--extended_s3_destination_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `extended_s3_destination_configuration`

Required:

- `bucket_arn` (String) ARN of the S3 bucket.
- `role_arn` (String) ARN of the IAM role used to access the S3 bucket.

Optional:

- `buffering_hints` (Block List, Max: 1) Buffering options. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--extended_s3_destination_configuration--buffering_hints))
- `cloudwatch_logging_options` (Block List, Max: 1) CloudWatch logging configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--extended_s3_destination_configuration--cloudwatch_logging_options))
- `compression_format` (String) Compression format. Default: `UNCOMPRESSED`. Defaults to `UNCOMPRESSED`.
- `error_output_prefix` (String) Prefix pattern for failed records.
- `prefix` (String) YYYY/MM/DD/HH prefix pattern for S3 object keys.
- `processing_configuration` (Block List, Max: 1) Configuration for data processing. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--extended_s3_destination_configuration--processing_configuration))
- `s3_backup_mode` (String) S3 backup mode. `Disabled` (default) or `Enabled`. Defaults to `Disabled`.

<a id="nestedblock--extended_s3_destination_configuration--buffering_hints"></a>
### Nested Schema for `extended_s3_destination_configuration.buffering_hints`

Optional:

- `interval_in_seconds` (Number) Buffer interval in seconds (60–900). Default 300. Defaults to `300`.
- `size_in_mbs` (Number) Buffer size in MB before delivery (1–128). Default 5. Defaults to `5`.


<a id="nestedblock--extended_s3_destination_configuration--cloudwatch_logging_options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `extended_s3_destination_configuration.cloudwatch_logging_options`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Defaults to `false`.
- `log_group_name` (String)
- `log_stream_name` (String)


<a id="nestedblock--extended_s3_destination_configuration--processing_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `extended_s3_destination_configuration.processing_configuration`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether data processing is enabled. Defaults to `true`.
- `processors` (Block List) List of processors. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--extended_s3_destination_configuration--processing_configuration--processors))

<a id="nestedblock--extended_s3_destination_configuration--processing_configuration--processors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `extended_s3_destination_configuration.processing_configuration.processors`

Required:

- `type` (String) Processor type. Valid values: `RecordDeAggregation`, `Decompression`, `CloudWatchLogProcessing`, `Lambda`, `MetadataExtraction`, `AppendDelimiterToRecord`.

Optional:

- `parameters` (Block Set) List of processor parameters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--extended_s3_destination_configuration--processing_configuration--processors--parameters))

<a id="nestedblock--extended_s3_destination_configuration--processing_configuration--processors--parameters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `extended_s3_destination_configuration.processing_configuration.processors.parameters`

Required:

- `parameter_name` (String) Parameter name (e.g. `LambdaArn`, `NumberOfRetries`, `RoleArn`, `BufferSizeInMBs`, `BufferIntervalInSeconds`).
- `parameter_value` (String) Parameter value.





<a id="nestedblock--kinesis_source_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `kinesis_source_configuration`

Required:

- `kinesis_stream_arn` (String) ARN of the source Kinesis stream.
- `role_arn` (String) ARN of the IAM role that grants Firehose access to the Kinesis stream.


<a id="nestedblock--msk_source_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `msk_source_configuration`

Required:

- `authentication_configuration` (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Authentication configuration for the MSK cluster. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--msk_source_configuration--authentication_configuration))
- `msk_cluster_arn` (String) ARN of the MSK cluster.
- `read_from_timestamp` (String) Starting position in the MSK topic in RFC3339 format (e.g. `2024-01-01T00:00:00Z`). Use `1970-01-01T00:00:00Z` to read from earliest.
- `topic_name` (String) The Kafka topic name.

<a id="nestedblock--msk_source_configuration--authentication_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `msk_source_configuration.authentication_configuration`

Required:

- `connectivity` (String) Network connectivity. `PUBLIC` or `PRIVATE`.
- `role_arn` (String) ARN of the IAM role for MSK access.



<a id="nestedblock--opensearch_destination_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `opensearch_destination_configuration`

Required:

- `index_name` (String) The OpenSearch index name.
- `role_arn` (String) ARN of the IAM role.
- `s3_configuration` (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Intermediate S3 configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--opensearch_destination_configuration--s3_configuration))

Optional:

- `buffering_hints` (Block List, Max: 1) Buffering options. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--opensearch_destination_configuration--buffering_hints))
- `cloudwatch_logging_options` (Block List, Max: 1) CloudWatch logging configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--opensearch_destination_configuration--cloudwatch_logging_options))
- `cluster_endpoint` (String) Endpoint of the OpenSearch cluster. Conflicts with `domain_arn`.
- `document_id_options` (Block List, Max: 1) Document ID options. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--opensearch_destination_configuration--document_id_options))
- `domain_arn` (String) ARN of the OpenSearch domain. Conflicts with `cluster_endpoint`.
- `index_rotation_period` (String) Index rotation period. Valid values: `NoRotation`, `OneHour`, `OneDay`, `OneWeek`, `OneMonth`. Default: `OneDay`. Defaults to `OneDay`.
- `processing_configuration` (Block List, Max: 1) Configuration for data processing. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--opensearch_destination_configuration--processing_configuration))
- `retry_duration` (Number) Retry duration in seconds on delivery failure (0–7200). Default: 300. Defaults to `300`.
- `s3_backup_mode` (String) S3 backup mode. `FailedDocumentsOnly` (default) or `AllDocuments`. Defaults to `FailedDocumentsOnly`.
- `type_name` (String) Elasticsearch type name (for ES 6.x). Max 100 chars.
- `vpc_configuration` (Block List, Max: 1) VPC configuration. ForceNew. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--opensearch_destination_configuration--vpc_configuration))

<a id="nestedblock--opensearch_destination_configuration--s3_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `opensearch_destination_configuration.s3_configuration`

Required:

- `bucket_arn` (String) ARN of the S3 bucket.
- `role_arn` (String) ARN of the IAM role.

Optional:

- `buffering_hints` (Block List, Max: 1) Buffering options. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--opensearch_destination_configuration--s3_configuration--buffering_hints))
- `cloudwatch_logging_options` (Block List, Max: 1) CloudWatch logging configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--opensearch_destination_configuration--s3_configuration--cloudwatch_logging_options))
- `compression_format` (String) Compression format. Default: `UNCOMPRESSED`. Defaults to `UNCOMPRESSED`.
- `prefix` (String) S3 key prefix.

<a id="nestedblock--opensearch_destination_configuration--s3_configuration--buffering_hints"></a>
### Nested Schema for `opensearch_destination_configuration.s3_configuration.buffering_hints`

Optional:

- `interval_in_seconds` (Number) Buffer interval in seconds (60–900). Default 300. Defaults to `300`.
- `size_in_mbs` (Number) Buffer size in MB before delivery (1–128). Default 5. Defaults to `5`.


<a id="nestedblock--opensearch_destination_configuration--s3_configuration--cloudwatch_logging_options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `opensearch_destination_configuration.s3_configuration.cloudwatch_logging_options`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Defaults to `false`.
- `log_group_name` (String)
- `log_stream_name` (String)

Optional:

- `interval_in_seconds` (Number) Buffer interval in seconds (60–900). Default 300. Defaults to `300`.
- `size_in_mbs` (Number) Buffer size in MB before delivery (1–128). Default 5. Defaults to `5`.

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Defaults to `false`.
- `log_group_name` (String)
- `log_stream_name` (String)


<a id="nestedblock--opensearch_destination_configuration--document_id_options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `opensearch_destination_configuration.document_id_options`

Required:

- `default_document_id_format` (String) Document ID format. `FIREHOSE_DEFAULT` or `OPENSEARCH_GENERATED`.


<a id="nestedblock--opensearch_destination_configuration--processing_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `opensearch_destination_configuration.processing_configuration`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether data processing is enabled. Defaults to `true`.
- `processors` (Block List) List of processors. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--opensearch_destination_configuration--processing_configuration--processors))

<a id="nestedblock--opensearch_destination_configuration--processing_configuration--processors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `opensearch_destination_configuration.processing_configuration.processors`

Required:

- `type` (String) Processor type. Valid values: `RecordDeAggregation`, `Decompression`, `CloudWatchLogProcessing`, `Lambda`, `MetadataExtraction`, `AppendDelimiterToRecord`.

Optional:

- `parameters` (Block Set) List of processor parameters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--opensearch_destination_configuration--processing_configuration--processors--parameters))

<a id="nestedblock--opensearch_destination_configuration--processing_configuration--processors--parameters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `opensearch_destination_configuration.processing_configuration.processors.parameters`

Required:

- `parameter_name` (String) Parameter name (e.g. `LambdaArn`, `NumberOfRetries`, `RoleArn`, `BufferSizeInMBs`, `BufferIntervalInSeconds`).
- `parameter_value` (String) Parameter value.




<a id="nestedblock--opensearch_destination_configuration--vpc_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `opensearch_destination_configuration.vpc_configuration`

Required:

- `role_arn` (String) ARN of the IAM role for VPC access.
- `security_group_ids` (Set of String) List of security group IDs.
- `subnet_ids` (Set of String) List of subnet IDs.

Read-Only:

- `vpc_id` (String) The VPC ID (computed).



<a id="nestedblock--opensearch_serverless_destination_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `opensearch_serverless_destination_configuration`

Required:

- `collection_endpoint` (String) Endpoint of the OpenSearch Serverless collection.
- `index_name` (String) The OpenSearch Serverless index name.
- `role_arn` (String) ARN of the IAM role.
- `s3_configuration` (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Intermediate S3 configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--opensearch_serverless_destination_configuration--s3_configuration))

Optional:

- `buffering_hints` (Block List, Max: 1) Buffering options. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--opensearch_serverless_destination_configuration--buffering_hints))
- `cloudwatch_logging_options` (Block List, Max: 1) CloudWatch logging configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--opensearch_serverless_destination_configuration--cloudwatch_logging_options))
- `processing_configuration` (Block List, Max: 1) Configuration for data processing. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--opensearch_serverless_destination_configuration--processing_configuration))
- `retry_duration` (Number) Retry duration in seconds (0–7200). Default: 300. Defaults to `300`.
- `s3_backup_mode` (String) S3 backup mode. `FailedDocumentsOnly` (default) or `AllDocuments`. Defaults to `FailedDocumentsOnly`.
- `vpc_configuration` (Block List, Max: 1) VPC configuration. ForceNew. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--opensearch_serverless_destination_configuration--vpc_configuration))

<a id="nestedblock--opensearch_serverless_destination_configuration--s3_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `opensearch_serverless_destination_configuration.s3_configuration`

- `role_arn` (String) ARN of the IAM role.

Optional:

- `buffering_hints` (Block List, Max: 1) Buffering options. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--opensearch_serverless_destination_configuration--s3_configuration--buffering_hints))
- `cloudwatch_logging_options` (Block List, Max: 1) CloudWatch logging configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--opensearch_serverless_destination_configuration--s3_configuration--cloudwatch_logging_options))
- `compression_format` (String) Compression format. Default: `UNCOMPRESSED`. Defaults to `UNCOMPRESSED`.
- `prefix` (String) S3 key prefix.

<a id="nestedblock--opensearch_serverless_destination_configuration--s3_configuration--buffering_hints"></a>
### Nested Schema for `opensearch_serverless_destination_configuration.s3_configuration.buffering_hints`

Optional:

- `interval_in_seconds` (Number) Buffer interval in seconds (60–900). Default 300. Defaults to `300`.
- `size_in_mbs` (Number) Buffer size in MB before delivery (1–128). Default 5. Defaults to `5`.


<a id="nestedblock--opensearch_serverless_destination_configuration--s3_configuration--cloudwatch_logging_options"></a>

Optional:

Optional:

<a id="nestedblock--opensearch_serverless_destination_configuration--vpc_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `opensearch_serverless_destination_configuration.vpc_configuration`

Read-Only:

<a id="nestedblock--redshift_destination_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `redshift_destination_configuration`

Required:

- `cluster_jdbcurl` (String) The database connection string.
- `copy_command` (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) COPY command configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--redshift_destination_configuration--copy_command))
- `role_arn` (String) ARN of the IAM role.
- `s3_configuration` (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Intermediate S3 configuration (mandatory for Redshift). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--redshift_destination_configuration--s3_configuration))
- `username` (String) The Redshift username.

Optional:

- `cloudwatch_logging_options` (Block List, Max: 1) CloudWatch logging configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--redshift_destination_configuration--cloudwatch_logging_options))
- `password` (String, Sensitive) The Redshift password. Write-only — not returned by the API.
- `processing_configuration` (Block List, Max: 1) Configuration for data processing. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--redshift_destination_configuration--processing_configuration))
- `retry_duration` (Number) Retry duration in seconds on delivery failure. Default: 3600. Defaults to `3600`.
- `s3_backup_configuration` (Block List, Max: 1) S3 backup configuration. Required when s3_backup_mode is Enabled. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--redshift_destination_configuration--s3_backup_configuration))
- `s3_backup_mode` (String) S3 backup mode. `Disabled` (default) or `Enabled`. Defaults to `Disabled`.
- `secrets_manager_configuration` (Block List, Max: 1) Secrets Manager configuration as an alternative to username/password. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--redshift_destination_configuration--secrets_manager_configuration))

<a id="nestedblock--redshift_destination_configuration--copy_command"></a>
### Nested Schema for `redshift_destination_configuration.copy_command`

Required:

- `data_table_name` (String) The name of the target table.

Optional:

- `copy_options` (String) Optional parameters for the COPY command.
- `data_table_columns` (String) Comma-separated list of column names.


<a id="nestedblock--redshift_destination_configuration--s3_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `redshift_destination_configuration.s3_configuration`

Required:

- `bucket_arn` (String) ARN of the S3 bucket.
- `role_arn` (String) ARN of the IAM role.

Optional:

- `buffering_hints` (Block List, Max: 1) Buffering options. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--redshift_destination_configuration--s3_configuration--buffering_hints))
- `cloudwatch_logging_options` (Block List, Max: 1) CloudWatch logging configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--redshift_destination_configuration--s3_configuration--cloudwatch_logging_options))
- `compression_format` (String) Compression format. Default: `UNCOMPRESSED`. Defaults to `UNCOMPRESSED`.
- `prefix` (String) S3 key prefix.

<a id="nestedblock--redshift_destination_configuration--s3_configuration--buffering_hints"></a>
### Nested Schema for `redshift_destination_configuration.s3_configuration.buffering_hints`

Optional:

- `interval_in_seconds` (Number) Buffer interval in seconds (60–900). Default 300. Defaults to `300`.
- `size_in_mbs` (Number) Buffer size in MB before delivery (1–128). Default 5. Defaults to `5`.


<a id="nestedblock--redshift_destination_configuration--s3_configuration--cloudwatch_logging_options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `redshift_destination_configuration.s3_configuration.cloudwatch_logging_options`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Defaults to `false`.
- `log_group_name` (String)
- `log_stream_name` (String)

Optional:

<a id="nestedblock--redshift_destination_configuration--s3_backup_configuration"></a>

- `role_arn` (String) ARN of the IAM role.

<a id="nestedblock--redshift_destination_configuration--secrets_manager_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `redshift_destination_configuration.secrets_manager_configuration`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether Secrets Manager is enabled. Defaults to `false`.
- `role_arn` (String) IAM role ARN to access the secret.
- `secret_arn` (String) ARN of the Secrets Manager secret.



<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `delete` (String)
- `update` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Example: Importing an existing AWS Firehose delivery stream
#  - *TENANT_ID* is the tenant GUID
#  - *SHORT_NAME* is the short name of the delivery stream (without the tenant prefix)
#
terraform import duplocloud_aws_firehose.stream *TENANT_ID*/*SHORT_NAME*
```
